checkedClaims.claimText: Applied category theory matters here because local theories become reusable only when schemas, transformations, and composition rules remain explicit enough to compare and transport across domains [FONG-SPIVAK-2019].

checkedClaims.claimText: Applied category theory is presented through concrete real-world examples paired with explicit categorical structures, including databases, circuits, and dynamical systems [FONG-SPIVAK-2019].

checkedClaims.supportSnippet: The tour takes place over seven sketches, each pairing an evocative application, such as databases, electric circuits, or dynamical systems, with the exploration of a categorical structure, such as adjoint functors, enriched categories, or toposes.
